title: Success Is Rented (Performance = Attitude × Skill × Effort)
html:
Success Is Rented

Stub. The two-line teen-Yahir thesis from October 2019: "Attitude × Skill × Effort = Performance" and "Success is rented every day and not owned, once you believe it's owned you begin to fall." Captured in 2019 10 16 life is meaningless without a pursuit. The multiplicative framing (any zero zeros the product) is the same systems-thinking instinct that produced the type effectiveness chart note nine months earlier.

Source summaries

  • 2019 10 16 life is meaningless without a pursuit
  • 2019 11 09 it doesent matter what happens to you it matter how you reac

Connections

disconnected from outcome · fear of not doing · systems thinking · grants pass teen era

related.label: 'If you're so afraid of failing, you'll never experience the winning' — May 2019 risk-tolerance line
